data.body: PASS 1 (T3 Integration feasibility): clean — no findings. The integrations the plan names are internal and already implemented (verified MATCH): `rebar review-plan`/MCP `review_plan` (src/rebar/_cli/__init__.py:1200, src/rebar/llm/plan_review), MCP `run_workflow` (src/rebar/mcp_server.py:839, executor.py:584), the atomic `claim` reuse (txn.py:claim_core, transition.py:claim_compute), the fast LOCAL HMAC verify with no LLM/network (attest.py:claim_gate_check), `--force`+justification audit log, and fail-closed-on-signing-unavailable. T3 is an external-integration overlay; this is an already-used internal integration, so it is not-applicable / PASS.
